how_it_works.title: Describe Your Delivery Service
how_it_works.description: Cuisine type, dishes, delivery area, and features — AI will account for everything.

how_it_works.title: Customize and Launch
how_it_works.description: Add real dish photos, prices, and publish — orders won't keep you waiting.

faq.question: Can I display a catalog of dishes with prices on the website?
faq.answer: Yes, in the builder you can easily create a catalog with categories, dish descriptions, photos, and prices.

faq.question: How will a customer place an order on the website?
faq.answer: Built-in cart allows selecting dishes, specifying address, and checking out — no phone calls needed.

faq.question: Is it suitable for restaurant delivery?
faq.answer: Yes, the website works for both standalone delivery services and restaurants with delivery option.

faq.question: Will the website be visible in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, SEO optimization is included — food delivery will appear in city search results.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a delivery website?
faq.answer: Start for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain, advanced features, and integrations.

faq.question: Can I add online payment?
faq.answer: Yes, paid plans include integrations with payment systems for accepting online payments.
